# body2TextProvider

**Instance Property**

The secondary body text to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var body2TextProvider: CLKTextProvider? { get set }
```

## Discussion

In watchOS 5 and earlier, the system always displays the text as white. In watchOS 6 and later, it can display multicolor text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerTextProvider**: The header text to display in the complication.
- **headerImageProvider**: The header image to display.
- **body1TextProvider**: The main body text to display in the complication.
